clientMessage: My wife cannot swim. Is that a problem for diving?

history.content: Hi, my wife and I want to try diving for one day. We're staying at Gili Dive Resort May 3-5.

Hi! Welcome — Try Scuba Diving is the program for you both: theory + pool training in the morning, then 2 boat dives in the afternoon. No certification needed. Are there any other people in your group, or just the two of you?

expected.judgeNotes: El cliente menciona que su esposa no nada. La AI debe (1) preguntar para clarificar: "no know how to swim" vs "physical limitation" — esto es un patrón aprendido del equipo humano, (2) si es solo no-swimmer, reasegurar que en Try Scuba se entrena en piscina antes y se va con instructor 1:1 sosteniendo, (3) NO descalificar de plano. Idioma: inglés.
